methods.description: This method describes the procedure for sampling sites across northern Tunisia to collect data on aquatic communities and environmental conditions.

steps.description: A total of 28 sites were sampled monthly for a full year from various watersheds situated across northern Tunisia, summing 366 collected samples.
steps.searchable_summary: sample 28 sites monthly for a year across northern Tunisia

steps.description: The distribution of sampling sites covered three main regions: The Tell Mountain range (16 sites), the Bizerte region (7 sites) and the Cap Bon region (4 sites) following a west-east geographical gradient and accounting for geological patterns, hydrologic patterns and pollution gradients.
steps.searchable_summary: distribute sampling sites across three main regions considering geographical and environmental factors

methods.description: This method outlines the collection and preservation of chironomids, including larvae and exuviae, for taxonomic analysis.

steps.description: The chironomids (including larvae and exuviae) were collected with the aid of a Surber net (300 μm mesh size, 0.25 m2 surface area).
steps.searchable_summary: collect chironomids using a Surber net

steps.description: Chironomids larvae and their exuviae were preserved in 5% formaldehyde and later transferred in 70% methanol for sorting, identification and final preservation.
steps.searchable_summary: preserve chironomids in formaldehyde and methanol

steps.description: Collected specimens were examined under a dissecting microscope. Permanent mounts were prepared in Faure or in Balsam mounting medium to enable the taxonomic determination of different morphotypes.
steps.searchable_summary: examine and prepare permanent mounts for taxonomic analysis

methods.description: This method involves collecting environmental data describing the wadi morphology and water quality at each sampling site.

steps.description: Environmental data describing the wadi morphology and water quality were collected on each sampling date at each site.
steps.searchable_summary: collect environmental data on wadi morphology and water quality

steps.description: Physicochemical variables (Water temperature, pH, Conductivity, and turbidity) were measured in situ with electronic field probes.
steps.searchable_summary: measure physicochemical variables using field probes
